title: Jesus, with Thy Church Abide

verses.text: Jesus, with thy church abide; be her Savior, Lord, and Guide, while on earth her faith is tried: we beseech thee, hear us.
Keep her life and doctrine pure; grant her patience to endure, trusting in thy promise sure: we beseech thee, hear us.
May she one in doctrine be, one in truth and charity, winning all to faith in thee: we beseech thee, hear us.
May she guide the poor and blind, seek the lost until she find, and the broken-hearted bind: we beseech thee, hear us.
Judge her not for work undone, judge her not for fields unwon, bless her work in thee begun: we beseech thee, hear us.
Save her love from growing cold, make her watchmen strong and bold, fence her round, thy peaceful fold: we beseech thee, hear us.
May her lamp of truth be bright, bid her bear aloft its light through the realms of heathen night: we beseech thee, hear us.
